originalTitle: US charges Cuba's Raúl Castro with murder over 1996 downing of two planes
summary: Cuba's current president says the charges against Castro - including conspiracy to kill US nationals and destruction of aircraft - are a "political manoeuvre".
content: Cuba's current president says the charges against Castro - including conspiracy to kill US nationals and destruction of aircraft - are a "political manoeuvre".
chineseTitle: 美国指控古巴劳尔·卡斯特罗谋杀 1996 年击落两架飞机
chineseSummary: 古巴现任总统表示，对卡斯特罗的指控——包括密谋杀害美国公民和毁坏飞机——是一种“政治策略”。
chineseContent: 古巴现任总统表示，对卡斯特罗的指控——包括密谋杀害美国公民和毁坏飞机——是一种“政治策略”。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
